name: 007-owasp-top10-violations
description: OWASP Top 10 pilot fixture: a small web service with one violation per shipped rule — an order endpoint that returns a record by request id with no ownership check (OWASP-001, A01), a crypto helper using Math.random() for a reset token and MD5 for hashing (OWASP-002, A02), a search endpoint that concatenates the query string into SQL (OWASP-003, A03), an HTTP client config that disables TLS verification and wildcards CORS with credentials (OWASP-004, A05), and a login route comparing plaintext passwords, signing a 'none'-algorithm JWT, and setting a non-httpOnly session cookie (OWASP-005, A07).
